text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem ACCESSReferralTypeCS

This case-sensitive code system https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSReferralTypeCS defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
patient-self-referral Patient self-referralThe patient independently initiated contact with the ACCESS Model participant to request services through the ACCESS Model.
provider-referral Provider referralA healthcare provider identified the patient as a potential candidate for the ACCESS Model.
direct-to-consumer Direct to consumerThe patient was reached through direct marketing, advertising, or outreach campaigns specifically designed to promote awareness of the participant’s services through the ACCESS Model.

name: ACCESSReferralTypeCS
title: ACCESS Referral Type
description: This codesystem defines codes that indicate how the patient was referred to the ACCESS Model.
copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS).

concept.definition: The patient independently initiated contact with the ACCESS Model participant to request services through the ACCESS Model.
A healthcare provider identified the patient as a potential candidate for the ACCESS Model.
The patient was reached through direct marketing, advertising, or outreach campaigns specifically designed to promote awareness of the participant’s services through the ACCESS Model.
